installation_requirements.concrete_floor: 4000 PSI (27579.2 kPa) mix, 6-1/2 inch (16.5 cm) depth
installation_requirements.anchoring_system: 14 Wej-it bolts, 3/4 inch x 6 inch (1.90 x 15.2 cm)
installation_requirements.hydraulic_line_height: 12 ft (3.65 m) standard, adjustable to any ceiling height or routed in-floor

specifications.synchronization: Hydraulic fluid displacement using no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
specifications.arm_pad_height: 5 inches (12.7 cm) minimum; 4-1/2 inches (11.4 cm) minimum for 3SA
specifications.arm_height_at_full_rise: 6 ft 5 inches (1.96 m); 6 ft 4-1/2 inches (1.94 m) for 3SA
specifications.max_pad_height_with_adaptors: 7 ft 2 inches (2.18 m); 7 ft 1-1/2 inches (2.17 m) for 3SA

features: Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization - no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
Automatic all-position mechanical safety locks starting at 3 inches off floor
Automatic swing arm restraints upon ascent
Manual mechanical safety release at both columns
Clear and unobstructed floor access between posts
Adjustable overhead hydraulic line height or in-floor routing
Available in standard 2-stage and 3-stage arm configurations
certifications: ALI/ETL Certified, Independently Tested and Validated
Tested and certified by NRTL to UL Standard 201 for Garage Equipment
ANSI/ALI ALCTV-2011 for Automotive Lift Construction
safety_features: Automatic all-position mechanical safety locks starting at 3 inches off the floor
Automatic swing arm restraints upon ascent
Manual mechanical safety release at both columns
8 double-sealed self-lubricating steel carriage bearings per carriage (16 total)
notes: Specifications subject to change without notice
Shown with adjustable height over-head steel hydraulic lines
Center of gravity reference shown in vehicle on lift diagram
